argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const group_id = '{{ group_id }}'; const count = {{ count }} || 25; const xsrfToken = document.cookie.split(';').find(c => c.trim().startsWith('XSRF-TOKEN='))?.split('=')[1] || ''; const url = '/ajax/feed/groupstimeline?list_id=' + group_id + '&refresh=4&fast_refresh=1&count=' + count; const resp = await fetch(url, { method: 'GET', headers: { 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest', 'X-XSRF-TOKEN': xsrfToken } }); const text = await resp.text(); let data; try { data = JSON.parse(text); } catch (e) { return [{ status: 'error', message: 'JSON parse error', group_id }]; } if (!data.ok || !data.statuses) { return [{ status: 'error', message: data.msg || 'Failed to fetch posts', group_id }]; } const posts = []; for (const item of data.statuses || []) { posts.push({ id: item.idstr || '', text: item.text?.substring(0, 200) || '', user_id: item.user?.idstr || '', user_name: item.user?.screen_name || '', created_at: item.created_at || '' }); } return posts; }

description: Get posts from a follow group
name: GroupPosts
